title: AI-Powered Academic Research Assistant
description: Multi-document AI research pipeline using LLMs and FAISS vector search to auto-extract, summarize, and compare research papers across key sections.
longDescription: Built a full research intelligence system that ingests PDFs, chunks and embeds them into FAISS, then uses LLMs to extract structured summaries across abstract, methodology, and results sections. NLP-based topic clustering surfaces contradictions across studies automatically.
bullets: Built a multi-document AI research pipeline using LLMs and FAISS vector search to auto-extract, summarize, and compare papers across 5+ key sections — reducing literature review time by 60%+

Engineered NLP-based topic clustering and semantic similarity detection to group papers into research categories and automatically surface contradictions across studies, improving cross-paper analysis accuracy by ~40%

title: Accessible Mobility Booking System (Whe-Friend)
description: Full-stack mobile booking platform enabling differently-abled users to schedule transportation with real-time seat allocation across 10+ trip management flows.
longDescription: A React Native mobile app with a Node.js/Express backend and MySQL database. Built with accessibility-first principles — reduced booking steps from 6 to 3 through streamlined UX and backend workflow optimization. Full JWT auth, input validation, and structured error handling throughout.
bullets: Developed and shipped a full-stack mobile booking platform using React Native, Node.js, and MySQL — enabling differently-abled users to schedule transportation with real-time seat allocation across 10+ trip management flows

Engineered 15+ RESTful API endpoints with input validation, JWT authentication, and structured error handling — maintaining 100% data consistency across booking and cancellation transactions during testing
Independently translated real-world accessibility requirements into technical features, reducing booking steps from 6 to 3 through streamlined UX and backend workflow optimization

title: Civic Report System — Smart City Platform
description: Smart city platform for reporting and tracking civic complaints like potholes and waste, with a citizen mobile app and an admin web portal.
longDescription: Full-stack civic engagement platform built with React Native for citizens and a ReactJS admin portal. Backend powered by Node.js, Express, Prisma ORM, and PostgreSQL. Supports OAuth2 and JWT auth, real-time status tracking, and role-based access for citizens and administrators.
bullets: Designed and built a dual-interface civic platform — a React Native mobile app for citizens and a ReactJS admin portal — covering the full complaint lifecycle from submission to resolution
Integrated OAuth2 and JWT-based authentication with role-based access control, securing admin and citizen flows independently
Implemented Prisma ORM with PostgreSQL to manage relational complaint data, enabling real-time status updates and assignment workflows

title: IntelliBrowse — AI Web Navigator Agent
description: AI-powered web navigation agent that uses local LLMs and browser automation (Playwright) to convert natural language queries into structured web insights.
longDescription: Combines a FastAPI backend with Playwright browser automation and a locally-hosted Mistral-7B model via Ollama. The agent interprets natural language instructions, navigates real web pages, extracts relevant data, and returns structured summaries through a React frontend. Supports OAuth2-secured sessions.
bullets: Built an end-to-end AI browsing agent that translates natural language queries into structured web scraping tasks using Playwright and a locally-run Mistral-7B LLM via Ollama
Designed a FastAPI backend with OAuth2-secured endpoints, orchestrating LLM inference and browser automation in a single stateful workflow
Delivered structured, readable insights from raw web pages through a React frontend, supporting complex multi-step navigation instructions

title: Smart Vision System — AI Assistive Tool
description: AI-driven assistive vision system for visually impaired individuals, combining real-time object detection, voice commands, and speech feedback.
longDescription: Leverages TensorFlow's SSD-MobileNet model for real-time object detection via OpenCV, paired with pyttsx3 text-to-speech and speech_recognition for fully voice-driven interaction. The system acts as a personal guide — detecting and narrating the environment through audio in real time.
bullets: Engineered a real-time assistive vision pipeline using TensorFlow's SSD-MobileNet and OpenCV to detect and classify objects in the environment at interactive frame rates
Built a fully voice-driven interaction layer using speech_recognition for command intake and pyttsx3 for audio feedback — enabling hands-free, screen-free operation
Optimized the detection pipeline for low-latency performance on standard hardware, prioritizing objects relevant to safe navigation

title: Identity Reconciliation Backend
description: Intelligent identity reconciliation service that deduplicates user records across email and phone, returning unified contact profiles via REST API.
longDescription: Node.js/Express service backed by Prisma ORM and PostgreSQL, built to solve the Bitespeed identity resolution problem. Implements a graph-traversal-style reconciliation algorithm to link primary and secondary contacts, returning a fully consolidated contact object for any given email or phone input.
bullets: Designed and implemented an identity reconciliation API that deduplicates user records across email and phone identifiers using a graph-linking algorithm with primary/secondary contact hierarchy
Built with Prisma ORM on PostgreSQL ensuring ACID-compliant transactions when merging or creating contact records under concurrent requests
Engineered clean MVC architecture with structured error handling and RESTful conventions — achieving deterministic reconciliation across all edge cases in the test suite
